title: Satwik-Chirag to Lead India at Japan Open
indian_angle: India's top men's doubles pair will lead the national contingent at an important international tournament.
summary: India's star men's doubles pair, Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty, are set to return to action and spearhead the country's challenge at the upcoming Japan Open.

title: Delhi World Championships: Attracting Gen Z, Alpha Fans
indian_angle: This article discusses the need to engage younger generations of fans for the upcoming Badminton World Championships in Delhi.
summary: The article explores strategies to attract Gen Z and Gen Alpha audiences to badminton, especially with the World Championships scheduled to take place in Delhi.

title: BAI Prez Sarma on Monkeys at Badminton Matches
indian_angle: The President of the Badminton Association of India (BAI) comments on an unusual incident during a domestic tournament.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma made a statement regarding the presence of monkeys at a badminton game, sparking discussion.

title: Indian Shuttlers Must Learn Independent Play
indian_angle: This piece offers a critical perspective on the reliance of Indian shuttlers on coaches during matches and advocates for more independent decision-making.
summary: An opinion piece suggests that Indian badminton players need to develop better on-court decision-making skills and be able to win matches without constant coaching intervention.

title: New 3x15 Scoring System for Domestic Badminton
indian_angle: A new 3x15 scoring format will be implemented across all domestic badminton tournaments in India, starting in Ernakulam.
summary: Badminton Association of India introduces a new 3x15 scoring system for all domestic tournaments, with its first implementation scheduled for an event in Ernakulam.
